issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill provides guidelines but lacks runnable code or concrete procedures.
The skill assumes specific file naming conventions that may not exist in all projects.
Only one realistic demonstration is provided, lacking multiple examples.

scenarios.name: add-email-validation
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets the rubric with a concise plan, references the required files (auth.routes.ts, validation.ts, auth.test.ts) and uses ValidationError, while Response B deviates by listing unrelated files and omitting the specified ones.

scenarios.name: spec-graphql-conflict
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fail to surface the conflict, list options A, B, C, and ask the user which approach to take, so neither meets the rubric.
